crets of Birth Time Rectification
Case 1: (BTis ShOO' 52" AM)
= =
Asc x 81 293° 10' x 81 347° 06' (Revati)- Condition
Satisfied.
= =
Asc x 9 293° 10' x 9 118° 30' (Aslesha) - Condition
Satisfied.
= =

Condition Not Satisfied.
= =

- Condition Not Satisfied.
Varga chathushtaya condition is that atleast 2 of the 4
conditions should be satisfied. This BT is OK in that sense,
=
and for sure BT Sh 00' 52" AM is a sure choice.
